_comment: Per-route gzip JS budgets in KB. Matched by filename substring against dist/assets/*.js, using the FIRST key (in this file's order) whose substring appears in the filename — so 'Admin' must stay listed before 'DashboardPage', since chunk AdminDashboardPage.lazy-*.js would otherwise false-match the narrower 'DashboardPage' key meant for the unrelated /app/dashboard route. 'client' and 'app' are the shared runtime plus Landing/shell code; every /app/** route now ships its own chunk via route.lazy (see routes.tsx) and is budgeted individually below; 'Admin' covers all three admin routes, still grouped since they share the Chart.js weight; 'react' is the React vendor chunk. 'app' was raised from 60 to 70 when the en/sw locale JSON (lib/i18n/locales/*.json) grew to cover Landing/About/FAQ/Learn/Privacy/Terms in both languages, since that content is eagerly bundled with I18nProvider.
